item.title: Google opens AI centre as Berlin defends US tech reliance
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
German Chancellor Friedrich Merz's coalition has signalled it wants to make progress on the AI front as part of efforts to revive the struggling economy.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), law(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), funding(+2), who(+2)

item.title: US says to escort ships in Strait of Hormuz ‘soon’
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The US Navy is expected to escort tankers through the Strait of Hormuz to avoid disruption of global oil supplies.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), sanctions(+2), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: US judge to hold closed-door meeting on US$175b Trump-era tariff refunds

Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)

item.title: Down but not out: Emerging markets could endure Middle East shocks, investors say
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)

item.title: Anthropic vows court fight in Pentagon row
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
CEO Dario Amodei says the company has no choice but to challenge in court the Pentagon's formal designation of the AI firm as a risk to US national security.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Hungary-Ukraine oil dispute escalates with US$82m bank cash and gold standoff
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
Kyiv says Budapest detained seven Ukrainian bank employeesUkraine says workers were carrying some US$82 million in cash...

item.title: Strait of Hormuz tensions keep global equities on edge
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)

item.title: Most Asian equities drop as Mideast crisis rages, though oil dips
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Investors are wondering when the US-Israel war on Iran and Tehran's attacks across the Gulf region will end.
Matched: war(+3), ceasefire(+3), sanctions(+2), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US stock futures steady as investors weigh Middle East war fallout
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
A prolonged disruption in shipping through the strategic Strait of Hormuz is likely to further fuel inflation pressures through energy and shipping costs.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: BNM keeps OPR at 2.75pc as supportive stance holds amid volatile global conditions, say economists
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 5 — Bank Negara Malaysia’s decision to keep the Overnight Policy Rate (OPR) steady at 2....

item.title: Trump hit with new tariff lawsuit as US states accuse him of illegal ‘end run’ around Supreme Court ruling
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
WASHINGTON, March 6 — A group of 24 US states sued President Donald Trump’s administration on Thursday in th...

item.title: Pentagon formally designates Anthropic as supply-chain risk
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
It is the first time a US company has received the 'supply-chain risk' designation, previously reserved for firms from adversary countries such as China’s Huawei.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Wall Street closes down as oil prices spike on Middle East conflict
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
US oil rises 8% to highest since July 2024 amid Middle East conflict, stoking inflation concerns.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: Ringgit ends lower as Middle East tensions keep dollar in demand
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)

item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
WASHINGTON, March 5 — A US trade court judge on Wednesday ordered the government to begin paying potentially billi...
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Middle East developments set to sway US stocks
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Investors are balancing the historic tendency for equities to rebound after major global developments against a lack of clarity about the Iran situation.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: Wealthy Asians move Dubai assets amid Iran war fears
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Affluent Asians are moving their Dubai-parked assets to the regional financial hubs of Singapore and Hong Kong as the US-Israel war on Iran clouds the Gulf's safe-haven aura.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Middle East tensions cloud plans to raise 2026 growth forecast
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Officials are now taking a more cautious stance as geopolitical risks intensify.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Gulf carriers resume limited flights, but missile fire fuels uncertainty
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Flights remain limited and uncertain with a chartered Air France flight from the UAE turning back due to missile fire, and Dubai airport operating at about 25% capacity.
Matched: budget(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: South Korean chipmakers warn Iran crisis could disrupt materials, push up prices
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
SEOUL, March 5 — South Korea’s chip industry is concerned that a prolonged Iranian crisis will disrupt suppl...

item.title: China sets lowest growth target in decades at 4.5-5pc for 2026
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
BEIJING, March 5 — China set the country’s lowest annual growth target in decades on Thursday at its yearly...
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), covid(+2)

item.title: US govt denies refunds on Trump’s illegal tariffs
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The customs officials are denying companies' requests to recover duties imposed under emergency powers invoked by US President Donald Trump.
Matched: policy(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Lufthansa warns of increased ‘uncertainty’ from Mideast war
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The aviation giant says Middle East tensions and their global economic impact increase uncertainty for medium- and long-term forecasts.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), covid(+2)

item.title: Malaysia’s economic exposure to Mideast conflict minimal, says Sim
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The deputy minister says trade with Iran accounts for just 0.09% of Malaysia's overall trade, reaching RM2.45 billion last year.
Matched: war(+3), sanctions(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2)
